strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems, high-performance backends, and real-time data processing (e.g., microservices at Dunnhumby, event-driven platforms at GISCollective)
Hands-on involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP integration and agentic workflows (re:cinq)
Strong engineering leadership track record, including mentoring, CI/CD, and TDD practices (RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited direct experience with fintech infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance) or regulated environments
No explicit mention of multi-agent AI system architecture at scale in production, nor trade decisioning or real-time inference systems
Lacks demonstrated success in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or leading hybrid models with external partners
response.justification: Bogdan exhibits strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time data, and AI-agent tooling, but lacks direct fintech infrastructure or multi-agent production experience in regulated settings. His leadership in high-growth environments is promising, though scaling to 30+ engineers and hybrid governance remains unproven.
